title: Cuneiform Tablet #0361: Middle Assyrian Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
